title: Bouncy Spanish Farfalle Pasta
description: A light and airy Spanish-inspired dish featuring farfalle pasta tossed in a rich coconut cream sauce, perfect for a crowd-pleasing meal

ingredients.name: chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: chopped fresh herbs add a bright, fresh flavor to the dish

ingredients.name: chopped fresh basil
ingredients.notes: add depth and complexity to the coconut cream sauce

ingredients.name: diced tomatoes
ingredients.notes: use low-sodium tomatoes for a healthier option

ingredients.name: grated Romano cheese
ingredients.notes: adds a salty, creamy element to the dish

ingredients.name: lemon juice
ingredients.notes: adds a touch of acidity to balance the dish

instructions: Drizzle with lemon juice and serve immediately
